data.body: [llm-prompts overlay / Pass-1] code-review-tests.md removes the parsed `outputs: code_review_findings` front-matter field. This is a CONTRACT field (a NON-human consumer branches on it): parsed at prompts.py:246 into `Prompt.outputs`, consumed by workflow/runs.py:281-289 (single_turn dispatch uses `prompt.outputs` as `output_schema`; empty outputs raises PromptError), editor_contracts.py:110 (`_schema_fields(prompt.outputs)`), prompt_library.py:134, and prompts.py:592 override-drift. All 20+ sibling code-review-pass reviewers declare `outputs: code_review_findings`. Not prose. Note: this exact diff is the seeded `R-frontmatter-field-removed` regression (expect: finding) in eval_specs/code-review-llm-prompts.eval.yaml:26-41.
